renderer.reason: Purpose-built MapGap runtime using selected direct renderer modules.

constraints: Internal alpha uses fixture projects only; do not load partner, customer, or authenticated project data.
Do not expose this app through the V2 Netlify site; after release approval, publish it as an independently rollbackable prerelease.
Do not allow arbitrary URL, cloud, SQL, plugin, or file-upload features in the alpha.
Do not store provider credentials, user access tokens, or V2 local state in portable projects or intelligence view state.
Run npm run audit:alpha on every dependency or lockfile change; an unfamiliar high finding fails CI.
exitCriteria: Pinned direct-renderer dependencies clear high findings and license review.
A deployed CSP/WebGL test passes without unsafe-eval.
A production review accepts the resulting SBOM, bundle, license, accessibility, scale, and rollback evidence.
